calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew K. Yan, Esq., Moscone Emblidge & Otis, 415-362-3599, appearing for Plaintiff;
No other appearance.

The matter is discussed. The Court vacates its tenatative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MOSCONE EMBLIDGE & SATER, LLP, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is withdrawn.

Stipulated order withdrawing claim of exemption and authorizing liquidation of securities is signed. Endorsed filed copy of the stipulated order is mailed to Los Angeles Sheriff's Department.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Rebecca Tovar CSR#14200, email: rtovar@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/EPS)
